creator: curtisjbrandt@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 153750
usergroups.xml LA user group link fix

Under the North America FreeBSD user group section (found here http://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html#north-america), The Yahoo Club (LA's user group) points to a dead link.

The proposed patch updates the link to http://groups.yahoo.com/neo/groups/bsdusersoflosangeles/info which appears to be the current user group page.
